text:
Walking through these angled, glass-enclosed corridors, I feel the calm sterility of a modern institution, suffused with a certain anticipation. The bright lights and clear spatial boundaries draw me toward reflections—of myself, of others—in the transparent walls. I feel momentarily both watched and invisible, suspended in the neutrality of this interior.

In the next space, surrounded by bold colors and the unmistakable promise of research and development, purpose courses through the environment. The presence of texts and screens radiates curiosity and intellectual excitement. Here, the collective dream of progress feels tangible. I am energized—a participant in the unfolding story of invention, open to discovery and moved by the creativity on display.
